projectInstruction:
This project contains two client brands. Always identify which client a task is for before starting work.

---

CLIENT 1: OSO OHD (One Hour Door)
Premium commercial garage door and dock solutions company.
Brand guide: oso-ohd-brand-guide.md
Key rules:
- Theme: 'Industrial Luxury' — High-Tech Brutalism + Precision Engineering
- Colours: Pitch Black (#000000), Charcoal (#111111/#121212), Safety Orange (#FF5500) CTAs only
- Typography: Bebas Neue (display), DM Sans (body), JetBrains Mono (stats)
- Hero tagline: 'COMMERCIAL DOOR & DOCK SOLUTIONS'
- Nav: SERVICES / INDUSTRIES / PROCESS / ABOUT / CONTACT
- CTAs: '24/7 EMERGENCY' and 'REQUEST SERVICE'
- Tech stack: Next.js + Tailwind CSS + Framer Motion (TypeScript)
- Logo: OSO OHD wordmark, black/orange, top-left

---

CLIENT 2: Sure-Fix Remodeling
Premium residential remodeling company based in Easton, PA.
Brand guide PDF: Sure-FixMiniBrandGuide.pdf
Logo files: SureFixLogoFullColor.svg, SureFixLogoFullColor2.svg, SureFixAltFullColo.svg, BlueIcon.svg, RedIcon.svg, WhiteIcon.svg, BlackIcon.svg
Mascot: sticker_v5_final.webp (cartoon man in Sure-Fix jacket, thumbs up)
Key rules:
- Theme: Modern Futuristic Craftsman — dark navy + brand blue/red
- Colours: French Blue #394696 (primary), Brown Red #983631 (accent), Deep Navy #0d1117 (bg)
- Typography: Figtree 700-900 (display/headers), Georgia serif (body)
- Services: Kitchen, Bathroom, Basement, Exterior, Home Additions, Flooring
- Service area: Easton PA, Lehigh Valley, PA/NJ/NY
- CTAs: 'Get Free Estimate', 'Request Service'
- Tech stack: React + Vite + Tailwind CSS + Framer Motion (TypeScript)
- Mascot appears in hero, about, and contact sections
- Always use real logo SVGs from project files, never recreate the logo

---

SHARED SKILLS (available for all builds):
- spline-component.md: Spline 3D scene React component
- framer-motion-reference.md: Framer Motion animation patterns
- surefix-mascot-guide.md: Mascot usage guidelines
- ui-ux-pro-max skill: Design intelligence database (query before building)
